name: LND
description: Lightning Network implementation. Wires automatically to Bitcoin Core.
compose:
name: "slashnode-lnd"
services:
  lnd:
    image: "lightninglabs/lnd:v0.18.0-beta"
    container_name: "lnd"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "9735:9735"
      - "127.0.0.1:8085:8080"
    volumes:
      - "lnd-data:/root/.lnd"
      - "./config/lnd.conf:/root/.lnd/lnd.conf:ro"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  lnd-data:
    name: "slashnode-lnd_lnd_lnd-data"
